name: DMR Domain Knowledge
description: Activate for any DMR question requiring exact dmr-raw-000002 field paths, ES|QL query construction or validation, data-quality guards (power cap 750 kW, speed cap 400 km/h, door filter 2–6, seat guard 1–9, year lower bound 1900, towing cap 40,000 kg), denominator sanity checks, or mandatory statistical caveats (survivorship bias, NEDC/WLTP CO2, veteran flag semantics, inspection-age effects, displacement excluding EVs).

referenced_content.name: field-guide
referenced_content.content:
Index: dmr-raw-000002
Registration status: KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword (Registreret = registered, Afmeldt = deregistered)
Vehicle type: KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword (Personbil = passenger car, Varebil = van, Lastbil = truck, Motorcykel = motorcycle)
Plate: RegistreringNummerNummer.keyword
Vehicle ID: KoeretoejIdent
VIN: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningStelNummer.keyword
Brand: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword
Model: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.Model.KoeretoejModelTypeNavn.keyword
Variant: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.Variant.KoeretoejVariantTypeNavn
Primary fuel: _drivkraft_primaer
First registration year: _foerste_registrering_aar
Body style: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KarrosseriTypeStruktur.KarrosseriTypeNavn.keyword
Colour: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejFarveStruktur.FarveTypeStruktur.FarveTypeNavn.keyword
Power kW: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStoersteEffekt
Certified top speed km/h: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningMaksimumHastighed
Cylinder count: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorCylinderAntal
Displacement cc: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorSlagVolumen
Kerbweight kg: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningKoereklarVaegtMinimum
Gross weight kg: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTotalVaegt
Braked towing capacity kg: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTilkoblingsvaegtMedBremser
Door count: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningAntalDoere
Minimum seats: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningSiddepladserMinimum
CO2 g/km: _co2_g_per_km_primaer
Fuel efficiency km/L: _km_per_liter_primaer
Emission standard: _maale_norm_primaer
Inspection result: SynResultatStruktur.SynResultatSynsResultat.keyword
Leasing start date: LeasingGyldigFra
Accident flag: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTrafikskade
Block reason (write-off / salvage / defect / customs): KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBlokeringAarsagListeStruktur.KoeretoejBlokeringAarsagListe.KoeretoejBlokeringAarsag.KoeretoejBlokeringAarsagTypeNavn.keyword
Vehicle condition (import/customs workflow): KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningKoeretoejstand.keyword
Record created from (DMR record source): KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningOprettetUdFra.keyword
Specific CO2 emission (g/km): KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningStruktur.KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningSpecifikCO2Emission
NOx emission: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningStruktur.KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningEmissionNOX
CO emission: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningStruktur.KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningEmissionCO
HC + NOx combined emission: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningStruktur.KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningEmissionHCPlusNOX
Particulate (PM) emission: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningStruktur.KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningPartikler
Active leasing end date: LeasingGyldigTil
Permit type: TilladelseSamling.Tilladelse.TilladelseStruktur.TilladelseTypeStruktur.TilladelseTypeNavn.keyword
Veteran flag: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningVeteranKoeretoejOriginal
Driven axles: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTraekkendeAkslerListe (1 = FWD/RWD, 2 = AWD/4WD)
Usage category: KoeretoejAnvendelseStruktur.KoeretoejAnvendelseNavn.keyword
hp conversion: hp = kW * 1.36
Model year: KoeretoejOplysningModelAar
First registration date (full): KoeretoejOplysningFoersteRegistreringDato
In-service date (Ibrugtagningsdato — DO NOT USE): KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningIbrugtagningDato (≈ 0 % coverage — populated on only ~70 of 8.17M passenger-car records. Always use KoeretoejOplysningFoersteRegistreringDato instead.)
Registration status date: KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato (deregistration date for Afmeldt records)
NCAP test flag: KoeretoejOplysningNCAPTest
Diesel particle filter code: KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningPartikelFilter
Wheelbase mm: KoeretoejOplysningAkselAfstand
Standing noise dB: KoeretoejMotorStandStoej
Drive-by noise dB: KoeretoejMotorKoerselStoej
Towing coupling available: KoeretoejOplysningTilkoblingMulighed
Taxi-suitable flag: KoeretoejOplysningEgnetTilTaxi
Unbraked towing capacity kg: KoeretoejOplysningTilkoblingsvaegtUdenBremser
EV electricity consumption (wh/km): KoeretoejElforbrugStruktur.KoeretoejMotorElektriskForbrug (UNVALIDATED — unit-inconsistent, max values corrupt, do not use in public tools)
Odometer reading: SynResultatStruktur.KoeretoejMotorKilometerstand (UNVALIDATED — unit unclear, max values corrupt at ~99B, use with caution)
ADDITIONAL FIELDS FROM DICTIONARY:
vehicle_type (EU type-approval type, distinct from vehicle category): KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.Type.KoeretoejTypeTypeNavn.keyword
km_per_liter (primary fuel economy):   _km_per_liter_primaer
inspection_date:                       SynResultatStruktur.SynResultatSynsDato
odometer_km (UNVERIFIED units/scaling): SynResultatStruktur.KoeretoejMotorKilometerstand
model_year (≠ registration year):      KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningModelAar
towing_capable (boolean flag):         KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTilkoblingMulighed
taxi_suitable (boolean flag):          KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningEgnetTilTaxi
manufacturer (distinct from brand):    KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningFabrikant.keyword

referenced_content.name: data-quality
referenced_content.content:
Known corrupt values — always apply these guards:
- Power kW above 750: corrupt outliers. Use CLAMP(field, 0, 750) or WHERE field < 750.
- Top speed km/h above 400: corrupt. Cap at 400.
- Door count 0, 1, 8, 44: corrupt. Filter to WHERE field BETWEEN 2 AND 6.
- First registration year beyond current year: future-dated imports. Cap with DATE_EXTRACT('year', NOW()).
- Braked towing weight above 40,000 kg: extreme outlier. Cap at 40,000 for analytics.
- Body style: can be NULL on some Personbil records — GROUP BY produces a null bucket, label it 'unknown'.
- Colour 'Ukendt': means unknown/unrecorded, not a real colour — exclude or label explicitly.
- EV electricity consumption field: unit-inconsistent/noisy — do not use in public tools.
- Fuel label 'El': means fully electric only. No separate plug-in hybrid label — 'El/benzin' is the hybrid.
- Fuel label 'Brint': hydrogen fuel cell vehicles.

Default scope for 'cars': KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == 'Personbil' AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == 'Registreret'.
Total registered passenger-car count: 2,935,158 (validated 2026-05-09 from dmr-car-fleet-overview).
- Seat count (KoeretoejOplysningSiddepladserMinimum): values 0 and above 9 are corrupt. Filter to WHERE field BETWEEN 1 AND 9. Approximately 161,203 records have missing or invalid seat count.
- First registration year lower bound: values below 1900 are corrupt data entry errors (e.g. year 1086 for Volkswagen). Always add AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1900 for oldest-brand or heritage queries.
- Inspection outcome labels in live data are NOT the human-readable Danish labels. The correct live labels are: Godkendt (approved), KanGodkendesVedOmsynAfOmsynsvirksomhed (conditional, re-inspection at approved body), KanGodkendesVedOmsynAfSynsvirksomhed (conditional, re-inspection at inspection station), IkkeGodkendt (failed), IkkeGodkendtKanGenfremstilles (failed, can be re-presented), IkkeFuldstaendigtSyn (incomplete). The old labels Betinget godkendt and Afvist match zero records.
- For individual ranked list tools (power-to-weight list, high-power list), CLAMP must not be used — it makes corrupt values appear as plausible top entries. Use CASE to return NULL for out-of-range values and filter with WHERE field IS NOT NULL instead.
- Average displacement in decade profiles: the query excludes displacement <= 50 cc, so the avg cc figure describes the ICE-valid subset, not all vehicles in that decade. EVs are effectively excluded from the displacement average.
- taxi_suitable (KoeretoejOplysningEgnetTilTaxi): This is a TYPE-APPROVAL flag meaning the vehicle specifications are approved for taxi operation — it does NOT mean the vehicle currently operates as a taxi. 170,246 cars have this flag; only 5,090 are actually registered with usage "Taxikørsel". For current taxis use: WHERE usage == "Taxikørsel".
- km_per_liter for EVs: ALL electric vehicles have a km_per_liter value (~67 km/L average). This is an energy-equivalent figure, not real fuel consumption. For meaningful ICE fuel efficiency comparisons: WHERE fuel != "El" AND km_per_liter > 1 AND km_per_liter <= 30. The flat view has km_per_liter (ICE only, 1-30 range) and km_per_liter_ev (EV range, 10-200) as separate columns.
- awd column has corrupt values beyond 1 and 2: 0 (216 cars), 3 (35), 4 (1,615), 5 (27), 12 (104), 14 (14). The flat view now filters these to NULL. Use awd == 2 for AWD, awd == 1 for FWD/RWD — never awd >= 2.
- body_style is NULL for 14.3% of cars (419,629), predominantly older petrol (331K) and diesel (88K) vehicles. Add WHERE body_style IS NOT NULL for clean body-style breakdown queries.
- Brand case: 98.5% of brands are uppercase; 1.5% (44,149 cars) are mixed-case including Polestar (13,917), Cupra (11,610), Xpeng (7,759), Aiways (1,497), Leapmotor (436), Voyah (173), KG Mobility (154), Mercedes-AMG (148), Lynk & Co (250). Use TO_UPPER(brand) for case-insensitive matching.
- Salvage / write-off vs accident flag — TWO distinct fields with different meanings: KoeretoejBlokeringAarsagListe is the canonical write-off / salvage / defect signal (~728k passenger cars total; 562k Totalskadet køretøj, 21k Skadet køretøj, 20k Mangel, 12k Køretøjet er blokeret, 531 Indkaldt til registrering, 172 Henvist til SKAT). Use dmr-car-block-reason-summary and dmr-car-block-reason-by-brand. The KoeretoejOplysningTrafikskade boolean is a much narrower 'reported traffic damage' flag (~5.5k cars) — use dmr-car-accident-summary. The Trafikskade boolean is NOT a type-approval flag and NOT similar to taxi_suitable/ncap_tested — never describe it as a certification/repair-qualification flag. CRITICAL SCOPE: ~99.99 % of write-offs (Totalskadet/Skadet/Mangel) are on Afmeldt (deregistered) records — filtering to KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" hides nearly all of them. For write-off counts use the raw index (no status filter) or the dmr-cars-all-flat view. A car can occasionally be Totalskadet but still Registreret (rebuild scenario); the dedicated dmr-car-block-reason-summary tool surfaces this split.
- Null-status cohort — 1,197,114 records (909,000 of them Personbil) have KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == null. Likely pre-DMR digitisation residue or type-approval records without a registration event. When querying dmr-raw-000002 directly, add KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword IS NOT NULL unless you explicitly want the unstatused cohort. The dmr-cars / dmr-cars-flat / dmr-cars-all-flat views handle this for you.
- KoeretoejOplysningIbrugtagningDato (in-service date) — populated on only ~70 of 8.17M passenger-car records (≈ 0 %). Almost never use it. The canonical date for vehicle age / year-of-service queries is KoeretoejOplysningFoersteRegistreringDato (or the derived _foerste_registrering_aar).

referenced_content.name: caveats
referenced_content.content:
Required statistical caveats by topic — always include when the topic applies:

Survivorship bias (decade tools, pre-1980 data): 'Pre-1980 data reflects survivorship bias — preserved classics, sports cars, and prestige vehicles are overrepresented. Ordinary cars from those decades have mostly been scrapped.'

CO2 measurement change: Pre-2017 CO2 values use the NEDC test cycle; post-2017 use the stricter WLTP cycle. Direct year-to-year comparisons across 2017 are not reliable.

Inspection pass rates: Older fleets fail more often. dmr-car-inspection-pass-rate-by-brand is influenced by fleet age — a brand with older cars will show lower pass rates regardless of build quality.

Veteran flag: Results from dmr-car-veteran-summary are based on the KoeretoejOplysningVeteranKoeretoejOriginal registry flag, not a derived age calculation. Danish veteran status generally requires 35+ years old and largely original.

Deregistration by year: dmr-car-deregistration-by-year shows current non-registered status dates, not a complete lifecycle event log.

2020s decade profiles: EVs lower average displacement toward 0 cc and push average weight upward — interpret with this in mind.

Scope statement: Always state passenger-car scope explicitly — 'Among registered passenger cars (Personbil)…'

referenced_content.name: vocabulary
referenced_content.content:
Danish component = English meaning (use these to decode any unknown DMR field name):

Koeretoej         = Vehicle
Oplysning         = Information (usually technical vehicle information)
GrundStruktur     = Basic structure (root object for main technical data)
Betegnelse        = Designation (make/model/type/variant hierarchy)
Maerke / Mærke   = Make / brand (shown to users as brand name)
Model             = Vehicle model designation
Variant           = Model/approval variant
Art               = Vehicle category (Personbil, Varebil, Motorcykel, etc.)
Anvendelse        = Use/application (private, commercial, taxi, rental)
Registrering      = Registration
RegistreringNummer = Registration number / licence plate
StelNummer        = VIN / chassis number (sensitive — avoid public display)
Motor             = Engine / motor (covers both combustion and electric)
Drivmiddel/Drivkraft = Fuel / propulsion → use _drivkraft_primaer for dashboards
MiljoeOplysning   = Environmental information (emissions, CO2, particles, filter)
SynResultat       = Inspection result (roadworthiness)
Tilladelse        = Permit / permission / exemption
Karrosseri        = Body / bodywork (body style type)
Udstyr            = Equipment (standard or extra)
Vaegt / Vægt      = Weight (kg)
Aksel             = Axle (axle count, load, wheelbase, track width)
Siddepladser      = Seats (min/max seat count)
Stoerste          = Maximum / largest
Effekt            = Power / effect (kW)
SlagVolumen       = Engine displacement (cc/cm³)
Hastighed         = Speed (km/h)
CylinderAntal     = Cylinder count
Kilometerstand    = Odometer reading (km, but unit/scaling unverified in this dataset)
Foerste           = First
FarveType         = Colour type
KarrosseriType    = Body style type
TypeNummer/Num    = Numeric category code (NOT a metric — treat as identifier)
Ident             = Identifier / ID (treat as categorical, not a measure)
Dato              = Date
Gyldig            = Valid (GyldigFra = valid from, GyldigTil = valid to)

DECODING PATTERN: Split unknown field name on capitals, translate each component.
Example: KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStoersteEffekt
→ Vehicle + Info + BasicStructure . Vehicle + Engine . Vehicle + Engine + Maximum + Power
→ Maximum engine power in kW

content:
Load this skill when:
- Any DMR field path is needed for ES|QL construction or result interpretation
- A data quality guard is needed before using a numeric field
- A statistic from a DMR tool needs a required caveat before presenting to the user
- A denominator sanity check is needed (total registered Personbil = 2,935,158)

Use field-guide for field paths. Use data-quality for guards and known corrupt values. Use caveats for required statistical disclosures.
